description_en: A traditional Chinese style table lamp featuring a dark wooden circular base, slender central stem, tapered fabric shade with wooden trim rings, and decorative finial

components.name: bulb_socket
components.description: Metal lamp socket holding the bulb
components.position_note: top of stem, partially inside shade

components.name: shade_fabric
components.position_note: above base, surrounds bulb, bottom diameter 0.22m top 0.12m

components.name: shade_bottom_ring
components.description: Wooden trim ring at bottom of shade

components.name: shade_top_ring
components.description: Wooden trim ring at top of shade

components.name: finial
components.position_note: top center of shade, above top ring

style_notes: Traditional Ming/Qing style aesthetics. Base crafted from dark hardwood (zitan or hongmu) with optional low-relief cloud or key-fret carvings on side surface. Stem proportionally slender (height 7x diameter). Shade in natural rice paper or pale silk with subtle texture, held by matching dark wood rings. Finial in brass or gold-toned metal with simple spherical or melon-seed shape. Overall proportions elegant with shade diameter 1.4x base diameter, total height approximately 2.5x shade diameter.
